mapper.sql: SELECT message_id, message_code, message_type, title, content, receiver_id, receiver_name, sender_id, sender_name, business_type, business_id, business_url, is_read, read_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time FROM invest_message
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invest_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invest_message (message_code, message_type, title, content, receiver_id, receiver_name, sender_id, sender_name, business_type, business_id, business_url, is_read, del_flag, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{messageCode}, #{messageType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{receiverId}, #{receiverName}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{businessUrl}, '0', '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE invest_message SET is_read = '1', read_time = #{readTime} WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
UPDATE invest_message SET is_read = '1', read_time = #{readTime} WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
